programme.desc: S01 E01 — Bunker Hill Over a year before the Declaration of Independence, America is born at Bunker Hill; the first major battle of the revolution is also its bloodiest.
programme.title: Kelsey Grammer's Historic Battles for America

programme.desc: S01 E02 — Brooklyn As British warships fill the New York harbor, George Washington rallies his Continental Army for the biggest battle of the revolution; with his men backed into a corner on Brooklyn Heights, it takes a miracle to survive.
programme.title: Kelsey Grammer's Historic Battles for America

programme.desc: S01 E03 — Yorktown After six years of war and with the fate of American independence in the balance, Patriot and French forces make a daring attempt to defeat the world's most powerful army and finally turn the course of the American Revolution at Yorktown.
programme.title: Kelsey Grammer's Historic Battles for America

programme.desc: S01 E04 — The Alamo In 1836, American settlers in Mexican Texas take over a former mission in defiance of the government, and for weeks endure a siege by Mexican forces; a nighttime assault earns these vastly outnumbered rebels a spot in American lore.
programme.title: Kelsey Grammer's Historic Battles for America

programme.desc: S01 E05 — First Bull Run The brutal fight for the soul of America begins at the Battle of Bull Run, the first major battle of the Civil War; as the Virginia hills run red with blood, hopes of a swift end to the war -- and the illusions of a young nation -- come to an end.
programme.title: Kelsey Grammer's Historic Battles for America

programme.desc: S02 E12 — How Freedom Was Won Highlighting the struggle and personal sacrifice of Patriot heroes and taking a chronological march through the American Revolution; what begins as a battle for the rights of British citizens turns into a violent class war.
programme.title: Legends & Lies: The Patriots

programme.desc: S02 E01 — Sam Adams & Paul Revere - The Rebellion Begins The story behind the Sons of Liberty and how they started the fight for American independence leading to the infamous Boston Massacre.
programme.title: Legends & Lies: The Patriots

programme.desc: S02 E02 — John Adams:Ready for War The first shots fire at the battle of Lexington and Concord; John Adams defends British troops killed at the Boston Massacre.
programme.title: Legends & Lies: The Patriots
